title: Wholesome Light Italian Tangy Tripe Lazy-Susan-TripeLasagna
description: A light and tangy Italian dish featuring tripe, made in a lazy-susan-style lasagna form, suitable for low-fat diets.
instructions: Cut the tripe into small pieces and sauté in olive oil until browned.
Mix together tomato sauce, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Add to the sautéed tripe and simmer for 15 minutes.
Arrange a layer of spinach on the bottom of your lazy-susan spinner.
Spread half of the tripe mixture over the spinach layer.
Add another spinach layer, then top with an even layer of mozzarella cheese.
Place the remaining tripe mixture over the top layer of cheese.
Cover and bake for 30 minutes. Serve hot.
